name: Meade County Bank
description_short: Kentucky-based community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, and construction financing across multiple local branches.
description_long:
Meade County Bank is a community bank operating as part of the First Breckinridge Bancshares family, which serves Kentucky and Southern Indiana through a portfolio of seven banks. The bank positions itself as a local, relationship-focused institution emphasizing personalized service with the tagline "We listen, then we lend."

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently offering 4.00% APY on 6-month CDs), and financial management tools like their Insights platform for budget organization. On the business side, Meade County Bank provides mortgage lending for home purchases and refinances, construction financing with flexible terms, and bridge loans to facilitate home transitions. They also offer online banking, debit cards, and fraud detection tools like Positive Pay.

Meade County Bank distinguishes itself through local community presence and emphasis on relationship banking. They offer a $50 bonus for new student checking accounts and position themselves within a larger regional network of Kentucky banks, suggesting stability and expanded resources beyond a single-location institution. Their membership in First Breckinridge Bancshares provides access to broader banking services and community involvement, as evidenced by their scholarship programs.

As a traditional community bank, Meade County Bank serves customers seeking local service and relationship-based lending decisions. However, consumers should be aware they are a regional institution with limited branch locations compared to national banks, and their product offerings appear more traditional without extensive digital-first features. Interest rates and fees should be compared directly with competitors, and availability of services may depend on location within their service areas.
services: Personal checking accounts with student checking bonus
Savings accounts and Certificate of Deposit products
Online banking and account login services
Debit card activation and PIN management
Mortgage lending for home purchase and refinance
Multiple branch locations for in-person banking
Customer support via phone and branch visits
pros: 6-month CDs offer competitive 4.00% APY according to current website
Student checking account bonus of $50 for new accounts
Positive Pay fraud detection tool included for checking accounts
Insights financial management platform to help organize and track finances
Part of larger First Breckinridge Bancshares network with seven Kentucky/Indiana banks
Offers construction and bridge loans alongside standard mortgage products
Community scholarship program demonstrates local commitment
cons: Limited branch network compared to national banks; service dependent on location in Kentucky/Southern Indiana
Website does not display interest rates for checking/savings accounts or loan terms
No mention of mobile banking app features or digital-first capabilities
Minimal information about overdraft fees, minimum balances, or other account terms
Traditional bank model may lack fintech conveniences younger consumers expect
best_for: Kentucky and Southern Indiana residents seeking community-focused relationship banking
Small business owners needing construction or bridge financing with personalized service
Homebuyers in the region looking for mortgage lending from a local institution
Students opening their first checking account with the $50 bonus incentive
diagnosis: Meade County Bank is best for customers in Kentucky and Southern Indiana seeking traditional community banking with personal service and relationship-based lending decisions. The main caveat is limited geographic availability and a lack of transparency on the website regarding rates, fees, and digital banking features—requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed product information and comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
